change.item: Standardised every bundled plugin namespace to the Alfa\ vendor prefix (alfa-shipments and alfa-payments Standard, and the alfa-fields plugins). Internal refactor only — no schema change and no effect on stored data.
Ship the GPL-3 LICENSE file with the package — installed into the component directory and covered by the file-integrity check.

fix.item: Fixed bundled module and plugin names appearing as raw language keys (e.g. MOD_ALFA_SEARCH_NAME, PLG_SYSTEM_ALFASYNC_XML_NAME) in the User Actions Log and Extensions manager. Manifest names now match each extension's element so Joomla resolves them to their human-readable titles.
Fixed a latent infinite recursion in the plugin layout event setter (onSetLayoutData), which could overflow the stack when layout data was supplied through the event's magic setter.

change.item: Internal housekeeping: removed stray developer backup files that were inadvertently included in the package.

Refined the payment/shipment plugin event model so redirect and inline template rendering are available only where they apply — the checkout views and the gateway-return step; order place/save hooks are now strictly data hooks.
Expanded developer documentation in the bundled Standard payment plugin — the gateway-return (onPaymentResponse) contract is redirect-only, with a copy-paste example for gateway authors.

fix.item: Drag-and-drop image upload in the media zone now shows the preview reliably, and gives a clear message when a file is the wrong type or too large — instead of a confusing "no valid files found" error.
The media upload size limit now follows the server's actual limit, and the standard image types are accepted out of the box when none are explicitly selected.

change.item: Reorganised the Media options into clear sections (Storage, Uploads, Thumbnails, Display, Deletion), and merged the two overlapping deletion settings into a single "Complete Media Deletion" option.
Updated the default media folder and placeholder images.
Added a "Delete all untracked files" action to Tools → Media for clearing leftover image files that have no database record.
Added database indexes to the media table for faster media maintenance and listings.

fix.item: The component Options screen now shows "Alfa Commerce: Options" instead of a raw text key.
Interface text that was previously fixed in English — labels, buttons, headings and messages across the administrator, the storefront and the Cart and Filters modules — is now fully translatable.
Updated deprecated Joomla document API calls so the storefront stays compatible with current and upcoming Joomla versions.

change.item: Tidied the language files: removed duplicate entries and an unused Greek translation, and grouped the strings into clear sections.
Removed leftover example fields from the component configuration; the currency and subcategory options are now translatable.
Removed an unused internal model and controller behind the Search Results page.

fix.item: The file-integrity check now refreshes immediately after an update, instead of waiting for its cache to expire.
Category images now display on the subcategory cards in the product listing.
The "Payment Methods" and "Shipment Methods" headings on a product no longer appear when there are none to list.
Clarified the wording of the file-integrity security note.
Removed the unused Metadata fields from the Place editor (places are not public pages).

change.item: The media-zone URL-thumbnail picker now explains that a default image is used if none is chosen, with a tidier preview.
Categories now use a single image picker (no URL option), matching Manufacturers.

fix.item: Installs without a given language pack are no longer flagged by the file-integrity check.

addition.item: Multilingual catalog — translate categories, manufacturers, items and more, each in its own language.
Order statuses with customisable status-change emails for customers and admins.
Customisable email layouts for order-status notifications.
Unique values for custom form field options.
Categories and Manufacturers columns and filters on the Items list.
Notification centre in the admin — a toolbar bell with a quick panel and a full history.
File-integrity check (Tools > Security) that verifies your installed files against the official release.
One-click export of the component as an installable package.
Automatic updates delivered through Joomla's update manager.

fix.item: Custom form field groups now work correctly on a fresh install.
The database Fix tool (System > Database) now recognises the component.
Order-status email "Restore defaults" now fills every section, not just the intro.
Notification sort options now show translated labels instead of raw keys.
The notification count badge now shows and hides correctly.
Tools now appears as the last item in the component menu.
